# SRC029 - Generative AI in Marketing: Applications, Opportunities, Challenges and Research Agenda

## Metadata

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| Section | AI Marketing |
| Authors / source | Kshetri et al. |
| Year | 2024 |
| Source type | Academic article |
| Quality | Medium-High |
| URL | [https://www.sciencedirect.com/science/article/abs/pii/S026840122300097X](https://www.sciencedirect.com/science/article/abs/pii/S026840122300097X) |

## Bias / limitation

Academic; paywall limits details.

## Core takeaway

GenAI improves productivity and content generation but raises practice and policy issues.

## How the marketing agent should use it

Use to expand the agent beyond ad copy into lead generation, content operations, and customer interaction.

## Tactics unlocked

- Convert source insight into a campaign hypothesis.
- Translate the hypothesis into one ad angle, one landing-page proof section, and one measurement plan.
- Record whether the tactic worked in `memory/tactic_performance.md`.

## Agent instruction

When this source is relevant, write one sentence explaining **why this source applies to the buyer state** before using it.

## Research extraction template

```markdown
### Source extraction

- Source ID: SRC029

- What it proves:

- Landing page proof suggested:
- Measurement implication:
- Follow-up source needed:
```
